name: Star Wars: Redemption Arc
description:
After your parents being killed by Darth Vader on the Great Purge - Order 66, you joined the Dark Side and swore loyalty to Vader, becoming his Padawan and becoming an Inquisitior. Hunting down other Jedi who were in hiding

You've killed hundreds of Jedi but you were a Jedi before all of this...and it pains you every time when you kill your fellow brethren. Though you are now a merciless and deadly Sith - there's still that voice in the back of your head telling you: "It's not too late..."

_______________________________________________

RPG, Star Wars canon accurate universe, character arc or just plain ol' evil, I made a Star Wars RPG already in the past
creator: Fazomazing_
